products.name: Monterey Futon Frame
products.description: The Monterey futon frame features a clean mission-style design with straight lines and a comfortable arm height. Available in Night & Day's standard finishes with Full and Queen sizes. Features the classic body design that converts easily between sofa and bed positions.

products.name: Sunrise Futon Frame
products.description: The Sunrise has two handsome tray arms that can be folded up or down as needed. Useful and attractive for serving drinks to guests or enjoying a snack on your own. Available in four finishes: Cherry, Black Walnut, Dark Chocolate, and Natural.Available in Full and Queen.

products.name: Dillon Futon Frame
products.description: Designed to optimize space even further, the Dillon's armless style allows for the cushion to be the statement piece. Available in Warm Cherry, Dark Cherry, Black Walnut, Natural. and Gray. Available in Painted Black and Natural in Full and Queen Size only. Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

products.name: Lambton Futon Frame
products.description: From the slightly curved slats to the grooves in the arm, the fine details of the Lambton make this arm simply stunning. The Lambton is available in two finishes: Warm Cherry and Dark Cherry.Available in Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

products.name: Autumn Futon Frame
products.description: The Autumn frame has handsome wide arms with an attractive lattice set, making a bold statement in any room. Available in four finishes: Black Walnut, Cherry, Dark Chocolate, and Natural.Available in Full and Queen.

products.name: Black Pepper Futon Frame
products.description: The Black Pepper Platform Bed is a dream bed built for style. Minimalist and gorgeous, its Art Deco simplicity will delight the eye and quiet the mind. Bed rails can be set up in two heights of 13.5" or 16.3" Available in Twin, Full, Queen, and King sizes Available in Cherry, Chocolate, and Stonewash Gray finishes

products.name: Galena Futon Frame
products.description: Galena is a new design, featuring subtle curves and thicker slats. Available in Black Walnut and Dark Cherry. Available in four sizes: Full, Queen, Full Loveseat w/Ottoman, and Queen Loveseat w/Ottoman.

products.name: Trinity Futon Frame
products.description: The Trinity reflects the classic futon frame with its straightforward design, well-suited for most home styles and offering exceptional value. Available in four finishes: Cherry, Black Walnut, Dark Chocolate, and Natural.Available in Full and Queen.

products.name: Winchester Futon Frame
products.description: The Winchester futon frame has a very appealing traditional mission-style design with solid steam-bent arms. Available in four finishes: Cherry, Black Walnut, Dark Chocolate, and Natural.Available in Full and Queen.

products.name: Rosemary Futon Frame
products.description: Have you ever noticed that rosemary will grow nearly anywhere, in nearly any environment? And it adds great taste to whatever it's combined with. That's one attractive, tough and versatile ingredient. Similarities to our Rosemary bed are absolutely striking. A platform bed with sturdy support, storage space below, and a stylish rattan headboard. The Rosemary Bed is a dual system frame using universal bed rails and can be assembled as a high (K-Series) or low (P-Series) platform bed. Does not require a box spring.

sustainability.materialSource: Solid Malaysian rubberwood sourced from managed rubber tree plantations; certified renewable resource

products.materials: Solid Malaysian rubberwood from managed plantations

products.name: Bali Futon Frame
products.description: The Bali futon frame offers a traditional slatted arm design that continues down the arm to encapsulate the sides. This frame is available with the Nesting Body Classic Design that features three positions: sofa, reclined, and bed. The arm is 2-1/2 inches wide and 23.6 inches tall, featuring a shutter style with a double row of 7 slats separated by a middle wooden piece.

sustainability.materialSource: Quality solid hardwoods with premium multi-step stain & lacquer processes

products.name: Flagstaff Futon Frame

These mattresses are available in retail stores only and feature premium foam construction that provides resiliency and comfort, is significantly lighter weight, and does not attract moisture and mildew.

sustainability.materialSource: Hypo-allergenic foam construction

products.name: Chandler Futon Frame

products.name: Pagoda Futon Frame
products.description: The Pagoda Futon Frame utilizes Wall Hugger technology that allows you to easily convert the frame from sofa to bed without moving the furniture away from the wall. Made from plantation grown rubberwood with a beautiful black walnut finish. Maximum weight capacity of 500 lbs (2 people, 250 lbs each).

sustainability.materialSource: Plantation grown rubberwood

products.name: Tamarind Futon Frame
products.description: The Tamarind Bed features a dual system using universal rails and can be assembled as a high (K-Series) or low (P-Series) platform bed. This frame does not require the use of a box spring underneath your mattress of choice. The platform is adjustable to two heights, either 15 inches or 12 inches from floor to top of slats.

sustainability.materialSource: Solid Malaysian rubberwood from managed plantations

products.materials: Solid Malaysian rubberwood from managed plantations

products.name: Haley 110 Futon Frame
products.description: A popular multi-purpose futon engineered for a medium-firm feel, with generous amounts of highly-resilient foam and polyester. Characteristics Comfort Level - A not too soft, not too firm feel Durability - 10-12+ years, designed to resist changes in support for years Thickness - A TRUE 8" (14" of overstuffed goods compressed to perform inside an 8" border) Weight - Per full size, 40 pounds Home Style Use - Sofa and Bed Frame Recommendations - Can be used on a bi-fold frame or a platform bed style frame Construction A 100% polyester fabric that breathes, stays cool and comfortable, and repels moisture. 9" of 2-pound density foam provides the ability to keep the mattress looking and feeling great. The flame-retardant rayon wrap and polyester protects the mattress and gives a clean, finished look. Machine tufting reduces the thickness of the mattress to lock in its good look and feel. The tape edge construction ensures a proper fit and finish of the mattress cover. Bench Built: Hand-made quality assures uniformity and quality control on each futon. Box Edges: For a TRUE reading of thickness. Overstuffed: Generous amounts (approx. 14") of different combinations of highly resilient foam and fiber that create an "inside out" force against the mattress ticking that is necessary for proper and comfortable support, whether sitting or sleeping. Tape Edge Closure: Expert mattress tailoring operation that seals the comfort inside the mattress ensures proper placement of materials in the cover and reinforces the edges to present a clean tailored look instead of a "haphazardly stuffed look." Compression Lace Tufting: This customized process alone will differentiate an Otis futon from any other! CLT serves to compress, strengthen, and control the overstuffed cushioning materials. Our "buttonless" tufting process forces the foam, fibers, springs, and mattress fabric to work together to create a supportive synergy that produces a comfort level unique to each mattress… bottom line, your mattress will feel as supportive as it did on the first day.

dimensions.note: 14 inches of overstuffed goods compressed to fit inside an 8-inch border

sustainability.materialSource: Highly resilient foam and polyester construction

products.name: Key West Futon Frame
products.description: The Key West will be perfect for your Florida sunroom. If you don't have one you'll feel like you do! These prime quality frames are made from the finest plantation-grown materials and are constructed with traditional woodworking good sense. The Key West arm is available in White finish, is 3.5" wide and 23" tall, and features 8 slats that form a slight arc bordered on each end by beveled decorative legs. products.name: Tozi Futon Frame
products.description: The Tozi is a low-profile arm frame with a sleek accent piece that fits great in tight spaces and allows the cover to be the focal point of the design. Made from plantation-grown rubberwood, the Tozi utilizes Wall Hugger technology — easily convert from sofa to bed without moving the furniture away from the wall. Strata Furniture is the only Wall Hugger Futon with its Patented Mechanism. The maximum weight capacity of the frame is 500 lbs (250 lbs per side). Strata uses a Low VOC finish that is safe for organic homes.

sustainability.materialSource: Plantation-grown rubberwood, Low VOC finish safe for organic homes

products.name: Gemini Futon Frame
products.description: The Gemini II is an ultra-premium seating and sleeping futon mattress manufactured by Otis Bed. It is 8 inches thick and features a blend of high-quality 4 pound, 2.5 pound, and 2 pound flat and convoluted polyurethane foam to create a firm supportive core and the feel of a latex-like sleep surface. It likens the feel and durability of natural latex, but at about one-third the cost of 100% Natural Latex. 10-year warranty. Arizona boutique line — sold in retail store only at Carolina Futons.

sustainability.materialSource: Polyurethane foam blend (4 lb, 2.5 lb, 2 lb density). Made in USA by Otis Bed, Buffalo, New York.

products.name: KD Lounger
products.description: The KD Lounger frame is a lounger, chair, and bed all in one! This multi-functional solid wood frame features numerous convertible positions and rounded corners, which is both functionally and aesthetically pleasing. This Lounger will be a sturdy fixture in your home for years to come. Popular uses for this versatile frame in all its multiple positions includereading, gaming, as well as watching sports and TV. This Lounger also makes a great transitional bed for small children: You can even adjust the back to your favorite position and read your child to sleep at night.Available in Twin, Full & Queen sizes. DimensionsTwin Size: 37"W x 74"L x 10" H (bed position)Full Size: 52"W x 74"L x 10" H (bed position)Queen Size: 58"W x 79"L x 10" H (bed position) Sofa Height: Twin 31.5"; Full 31.5"; Queen 36.5"Sofa Depth (extension underneath frame): 46" (all sizes)Overall Lounger Depth (w/extension): 63" (all sizes)

products.name: Wilderness Log Futon
products.description: Constructed of Norway pine, this log futon is skip peeled, which means a little bit of cambium or bark is still on the log, giving it a more rustic or natural log look. Each log has to be hand selected to be just the right diameter and have the right character. The knots on the logs are pronounced or sticking out, which are called character knots. Available in Clear FInish. Full: 85"L x 36"D x 32"HQueen: 90"L x 36"D x 36"H

sustainability.materialSource: Norway pine, hand-selected logs, skip-peeled bark finish

products.name: Center Legs
products.description: Two 11", 14", or 17" center support legs and 8 wood screws. Use the 11" center legs with the 12" optional leg height. Use the 14" center legs for the standard 15" platform height. Use the 17" center legs with the 18" optional leg height. These legs can be used to lend extra support to the outside rails of all sizes and/or the middle rails of the full and queen sizes of the Nomad, Charleston, or Lexington platform beds. Please note that the king size Nomad comes with this set of center support legs for the middle two rails. These support legs are only needed if you plan to exceed the 600 pound weight limit of the Nomad, Charleston or Lexington bed frames.

products.description: The Clove 6-Drawer Dresser, with optional mirror, is the grand piece of our Clove group. Six big drawers along with the huge dresser-top surface makes it the major utility piece in the group. Add the optional mirror (sold separately $290) to complete its grandeur. Available in Cherry, Chocolate, Natural, Stonewash Gray, or White finishes

products.name: Kingston Futon Frame
products.description: The Kingston futon frame is trim and stylish, featuring a patented Arts and Crafts stick-and-rail pattern in the arm. Available in four finishes: Black Walnut, Cherry, Dark Chocolate, and Natural.Available in Full and Queen.

contentPages.title: Carolina Futons | Futon Furniture
contentPages.description: Carolina Futons - Futon specialty store since 1991. Located at 824 Locust St, Ste 200, Hendersonville, NC 28792. Specializing in Night & Day, Strata, and KD futon frames, Murphy cabinet beds, platform beds, mattresses, and accessories.

contentPages.title: Futon Frames
contentPages.description: Night & Day, Strata, and KD Futon Frames. Front Loading (MoonGlider) and Nesting Body Futon Frames & Loungers. Available in multiple finishes and sizes.

contentPages.title: Platform Beds
contentPages.description: Platform Beds & Accessories from Night & Day Furniture's Spices Bedroom Collection and KD Frames. Solid hardwood construction, multiple size and finish options.

contentPages.title: Mattresses
contentPages.description: Futon mattresses including Otis Bed and Night & Day options. Designed for dual-use sofa/bed applications with proper support.

contentPages.title: Murphy Cabinet Beds
contentPages.description: Murphy Cabinet Beds from Night & Day Furniture. Space-saving solutions that look like furniture when closed. No wall mounting required.

contentPages.title: Casegoods & Accessories
contentPages.description: Bedroom furniture accessories including nightstands, dressers, chests, storage drawers, and trundle beds from Night & Day Furniture's Spices and Secrets collections.

contentPages.title: Wall Huggers
contentPages.description: Wall Hugger Futon Frames & Ottomans. Space-efficient designs that sit close to the wall in sofa position.

contentPages.title: Rustic Log Frames
contentPages.description: Rustic log futon frames including Wilderness, Northern Exposure, Mountainaire, and Denali models. Natural lodge-style furniture.

contentPages.title: Front Loading & Nesting
contentPages.description: Front Loading (MoonGlider) and Nesting Body futon frames. Different mechanism styles for converting between sofa and bed positions.

contentPages.title: Unfinished Wood
contentPages.description: Unfinished wood futon frames and loungers. KD Frames products in natural Tulip Poplar ready for custom finishing.

contentPages.title: About Carolina Futons
contentPages.description: Carolina Futons has been a futon specialty store since 1991, owned by Brenda. Located in Hendersonville, NC in the Blue Ridge Mountains. Specializing in quality futon furniture from trusted manufacturers.
